items.name: Terminal
items.description: Pure terminal aesthetic with CRT-inspired phosphor green/amber on black. Monospace only, ASCII borders, optional scanline effects. Dark mode only.

items.name: Studio
items.description: Warm, creative theme with coral accents and rich purple premium highlights. Friendly, approachable, premium but not cold. Inspired by Figma, Framer, Gumroad.

items.name: Neon Dark
items.description: High-contrast dark theme with electric neon accents. For agent dashboards, cyber UIs, and spatial interfaces.

items.name: Retro
items.description: Neobrutalism. Bold borders, offset shadows, sharp corners, snappy motion. Opinionated and distinctive. Everything feels physical and tactile.

items.name: Studio Dark
items.description: Music production theme with deep purple foundations, cyan waveforms, and magenta highlights. Electric and creative aesthetic for DAW interfaces, mixing consoles, and audio production tools.

items.name: Prismatic
items.description: Chromatic depth shifting. Iridescent, futuristic. Surfaces change hue as they layer deeper, creating a rainbow-depth effect. Each elevation level has a different hue tint.

items.name: Paper
items.description: Clean, minimal, content-focused theme with warm whites and soft grays. Inspired by high-end writing apps like iA Writer, Bear, and Notion.

items.name: Government
items.description: Accessible, conservative, high-contrast theme for government and public sector applications. Strong blue primary on pure white backgrounds. WCAG AAA mandatory with 7:1 contrast ratios. Full CVD support, large typography, and 3px focus indicators.

items.name: Gaming Guild
items.description: Immersive guild-hall visual language. Electric indigo + neon emerald palette, glow elevation, smooth motion. Deep indigo surface stack in dark mode. RPG-inspired typography with monospace data readouts and uppercase micro labels.

items.name: Healthcare
items.description: Clean, accessible, trust-signaling medical theme. Calming blues and teals on warm white backgrounds. WCAG AAA compliant with full CVD support. Designed for patient portals, clinical dashboards, and health monitoring interfaces.

items.name: Neon Cyber
items.description: Cyberpunk aesthetic with vivid neon accents on pure dark backgrounds. High-energy, high-contrast, data-dense.

items.name: Launchpad
items.description: Clean, professional aesthetic inspired by fly.io. Navy-violet palette, semi-transparent surfaces, violet-tinted shadows. Gradient accent buttons, transparent nav with violet active states.

items.name: Glassmorphism
items.description: Stormy blue frosted glass aesthetic. Dark glass surfaces with blue-tinted borders, sky-blue primary, cyan accents, and atmospheric gradient backgrounds.

items.name: Fintech
items.description: Data-dense dark-mode financial terminal optimized for real-time market data. Deep dark backgrounds with indigo and cyan accents. Monospace numbers, tight spacing, and minimal motion for professional trading and analytics interfaces.

items.name: Estate
items.description: Professional, trustworthy theme for property management. Deep navy for stability, forest green for growth, warm gold accent. Light mode default for business applications.

items.name: Luminarum
items.description: Geometric canvas with vibrant faceted color accents. Breathing gradient orbs, outlined cards with colored strokes, particle network details. Tech-forward meets visual candy. Dual dark/light modes: warm charcoal dark, warm off-white light.

items.name: Liquid Glass
items.description: Apple-inspired premium glass aesthetic. Refined, dynamic refraction feel. Extreme blur values, dramatic opacity ramp, specular highlights. True black dark mode.

items.name: Lab
items.description: Scientific research theme with pristine white surfaces, cyan accents, and IBM Plex Mono data displays. Precise 8px grid alignment and technical iconography for research, data, and laboratory interfaces.

items.name: Cinema
items.description: Film and video production theme with deep charcoal background and warm amber highlights. Title-card typography with serif display, film-grain texture, and dramatic framing for cinematic storytelling interfaces.

items.name: Dopamine
items.description: Saturated maximalism. Y2K revival. Joyful, loud, electric. Maximum saturation, heavy type, gradient everything. The anti-minimal design language.
